mapper.sql: id, enterprise_id, template_id, audit_year, lock_user_id, lock_time, expire_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tpl_edit_lock ( enterprise_id, template_id, audit_year, lock_user_id, lock_time, expire_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{enterpriseId}, #{templateId}, #{auditYear}, #{lockUserId}, #{lockTime}, #{expireTime}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE lock_user_id = VALUES(lock_user_id), lock_time = VALUES(lock_time), expire_time = VALUES(expire_time), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = NOW(), deleted = 0
